languages.text: {n}Ювенна пронзительно и зло смеется.{/n} "Пустые угрозы! У тебя духу не хватит убить дочь {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ювенна пронзительно и зло смеется.{/n} "Пустые угрозы! У тебя духу не хватит убить дочь {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} фон Валанциус".

languages.text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."
languages.original_text: {n}Ювенна пронзительно и зло смеется.{/n} "Пустые угрозы! У тебя духу не хватит убить дочь {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} фон Валанциус".

{n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of Rogue Trader von Valancius."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna produce una risotada estridente y rencorosa.{/n} «¡Amenazas vanas! No se atreverá a matar a la hija del {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} von Valancius».
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna produce una risotada estridente y rencorosa.{/n} «¡Amenazas vanas! No se atreverá a matar a la hija del {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} von Valancius».

languages.text: {n}尤文娜发出一声尖利而怨毒的冷笑。{/n}“虚张声势！你哪有胆子杀{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}冯·瓦兰修斯的女儿。”
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜发出一声尖利而怨毒的冷笑。{/n}“虚张声势！你哪有胆子杀{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}冯·瓦兰修斯的女儿。”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna laisse échapper un rire strident, empreint de malveillance.{/n} « Vaines menaces que tout cela ! Vous n'avez pas le cran de tuer la fille du {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna laisse échapper un rire strident, empreint de malveillance.{/n} « Vaines menaces que tout cela ! Vous n'avez pas le cran de tuer la fille du {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} von Valancius. »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna; tiz, kin dolu bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Boş tehditler! {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} von Valancius'un kızını öldürecek cesaretin yok."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna; tiz, kin dolu bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Boş tehditler! {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} von Valancius'un kızını öldürecek cesaretin yok."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna stößt ein schrilles, gehässiges Lachen aus.{/n} "Leere Drohungen! Ihr habt nicht den Mut, die Tochter des {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändlers{/g} von Valancius zu töten."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna stößt ein schrilles, gehässiges Lachen aus.{/n}"Leere Drohungen! Ihr habt nicht den Mut, die Tochter des {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}s von Valancius zu töten.

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは、虚ろな脅しだと嘲笑うように、尖った声で笑った。{/n}「{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグ・トレーダー{/g}のフォン・ヴァランシウスの娘を殺す勇気などないわ」
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna lets out a shrill, spiteful laugh.{/n} "Empty threats! You don't have the nerve to kill the daughter of {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジュベナは、虚ろな脅しだと嘲笑うように、尖った声で笑った。{/n}「{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグ・トレーダー{/g}のフォン・ヴァランシウスの娘を殺す勇気などないわ」
